desc: WindClan's Onestar recounts his life—from Onewhisker to leader—and the secret son, Darktail, whose vengeance he must finally face.
descZh: 风族的一星回顾自己的一生——从一根须到族长——以及那个他必须面对的、名为暗尾的秘密之子及其复仇。

q.en: What was Onestar called before he became leader of WindClan?
q.zh: 在成为风族（WindClan）族长之前，一星（Onestar）叫什么？

explain.en: Before receiving his nine lives, the cat who would be Onestar was known as the warrior Onewhisker.
explain.zh: 在得到九条命之前，后来成为一星的这只猫是名为「一根须」的武士。

q.en: Which WindClan leader surprised everyone by naming Onewhisker as his successor?
q.zh: 哪位风族族长出人意料地指定一根须为继承人？

explain.en: On his deathbed, Tallstar passed over Mudclaw and named Onewhisker as the next WindClan leader.
explain.zh: 临终之际，高星跳过泥爪，指定一根须为下一任风族族长。

q.en: As a young cat, Onewhisker secretly loved a rogue she-cat in the Twolegplace named...?
q.zh: 年轻时，一根须偷偷爱上了一个住在两脚兽地盘的流浪母猫，她叫……？

explain.en: Onewhisker grew close to a rogue she-cat named Smoke in the Twolegplace before he chose Clan life.
explain.zh: 在投身族中生活之前，一根须与两脚兽地盘里一只叫「烟」的流浪母猫渐生情愫。

q.en: What was the name of the kit that Smoke bore—Onewhisker's secret son?
q.zh: 烟生下的那只幼崽——一根须秘密的儿子——叫什么名字？

explain.en: Smoke named their son Darkkit, who grew up to become the ruthless rogue Darktail.
explain.zh: 烟给儿子取名暗崽，他长大后成了冷酷的流浪猫首领暗尾。

q.en: Onewhisker rejected Smoke and their kit, promising to return after what great journey?
q.zh: 一根须抛弃了烟和孩子，答应完成哪场伟大的迁徙之后再回来？

options.en: The Great Journey to the lake
options.zh: 前往湖畔的大迁徙（the Great Journey）
去夕阳沉没之地的旅程

explain.en: Onewhisker promised Smoke he would return for her and Darkkit once the Clans reached the lake, but he broke his word.
explain.zh: 一根须答应烟：等猫族抵达湖畔就回来接他们母子，可他最终食言了。

q.en: After growing up, Darktail returned to the lake leading a group of rogues called...?
q.zh: 长大后，暗尾回到湖畔，带领一群流浪猫，他们被称为……？

explain.en: Darktail gathered a band of rogues known as the Kin, bent on destroying the Clans his father failed.
explain.zh: 暗尾聚起一支叫「亲族」的流浪猫队伍，一心要摧毁他父亲所辜负的猫族。

q.en: Onestar finally confesses his secret to the other Clan leaders. Which of these was NOT among them?
q.zh: 一星最终向其他族的族长坦白了秘密。以下哪一位并不在其中？

explain.en: He confessed to Bramblestar, Rowanstar, Mistystar, and Leafstar; Leopardstar had long since died and was not there.
explain.zh: 他向荆棘星、赤杨星、雾星和叶星坦白；豹星早已离世，并不在场。

q.en: In the final battle, how does Onestar defeat Darktail?
q.zh: 在最后的战斗中，一星是怎样击败暗尾的？

options.en: He drags him into the lake, sacrificing his own life
options.zh: 他把暗尾拖进湖里，牺牲了自己的生命

options.en: He exiles him from the forest

options.zh: 他收暗尾做了族中一员

options.en: He asks StarClan to take him
options.zh: 他请求星族把暗尾带走

explain.en: Onestar locks with Darktail and pulls him under the lake water, ending both his son's life and his own.
explain.zh: 一星与暗尾缠斗，将他拖入湖底，终结了儿子的性命，也搭上了自己的生命。

q.en: After death, which former WindClan leader welcomes Onestar and tells him he has earned his place in StarClan?
q.zh: 死后，是哪位前任风族族长迎接了一星，告诉他已赢得在星族的一席之地？

explain.en: Tallstar greets Onestar in the afterlife and tells him his efforts to atone have earned him StarClan.
explain.zh: 高星在死后世界迎接一星，告诉他：为自己过错所做的弥补，已为他赢得星族的位置。

q.en: At the very end, Onestar grants a life to which new WindClan leader, for the gift of honesty?
q.zh: 在故事最末尾，一星把象征「诚实」的一条命赐给了哪位新任风族族长？

options.zh: 野茅星（Harestar，原名野茅泉 Harespring）

explain.en: Onestar gives Harespring his leader name and a life for honesty, reminding him to always put his Clan first.
explain.zh: 一星赐予野茅泉族长之名，并赠予他象征诚实的一条命，提醒他永远把本族放在第一位。
